hero.headline: *Sharp* results when your HOA's watching
hero.subheadline: Fair pricing, hard work, and we show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your yard needs
services_section.subheading: From cleanup to mulching to making the grass grow where it should

services.title: Lawn Cleanup & Maintenance
services.description: Remove dead weeds, trim overgrown areas, edge beds, and get everything looking neat again.

services.title: Mulching & Garden Beds
services.description: Fresh mulch installation, garden bed repairs, and fixing areas that have collapsed or shifted.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Trimming
services.description: Major trimming work for overgrown trees and shrubs that need professional attention.

services.title: Grass Seeding & Repair
services.description: Seed bare spots, repair damaged areas, and help new grass take root properly.

about.heading: Columbus yards handled right
about.body: We're the Columbus landscaping team that shows up, gives you an honest price, and does the work right the first time.

reviews.name: Alejandro B.
reviews.text: HOA was harassing me about my front lawn. Alex gave me an affordable quote and did amazing work - major tree trimming, removed dead weeds, fresh mulch. Looks incredible now.

reviews.name: SunflowerMamma H.
reviews.text: Great mulching and edging work. Fixed our collapsed garden bed and seeded grass areas. Fair pricing, dependable, hard worker. Grass is already growing!

reviews.name: yooo C.
reviews.text: My yard was very messy before Alex's cleanup work. Now everything is neat and organized. Highly recommended!

cta.heading: Ready to get your yard handled?
cta.body: Free quotes, fair pricing, and work that actually gets finished. Call or message us today.
